# libopus (vendored)

This directory contains a vendored copy of [libopus](https://opus-codec.org/) from [xiph/opus](https://github.com/xiph/opus), used by `OpusCodec.swift` and `OpusBridge.c` for encoding/decoding raw Opus frames in `MumbleUDP.Audio`.

## Source

- Upstream repo: https://github.com/xiph/opus
- Release: **v1.5.2** (tag `v1.5.2`)
- Tarball: https://downloads.xiph.org/releases/opus/opus-1.5.2.tar.gz
- License: BSD 3-clause — see `COPYING` in this directory.

## Layout

Only the portable C sources needed for encode/decode are included:

- `src/` — top-level Opus encoder/decoder (minus `opus_custom_demo.c`, see below)
- `celt/` — CELT layer
- `silk/`, `silk/float/` — SILK layer (float build)
- `include/` — public headers (`opus.h`, `opus_defines.h`, `opus_multistream.h`, `opus_types.h`)

Everything else upstream (autotools, tests, `doc/`, `opus_demo`, `opus_custom_demo`, fixed-point SILK, ARM/x86 assembly optimizations) is intentionally omitted.

## Local modifications

1. **`config.h` is handwritten** for this build rather than generated by autotools. It enables the float codepath, disables fixed-point, and declines SIMD. If you update libopus, diff this file against whatever the newer release expects and adjust feature macros accordingly.

2. **`src/opus_custom_demo.c` is removed.** It references `opus_custom_decode` / `opus_custom_encode`, which only exist when custom modes are compiled in, and we don't build them. Leaving the file in produces a link error for `_opus_custom_decode`.

3. **Build settings live in `mumble-macos.xcodeproj`**, not here:
   - `GCC_PREPROCESSOR_DEFINITIONS` adds `OPUS_BUILD` and `HAVE_CONFIG_H`.
   - `HEADER_SEARCH_PATHS` includes `ThirdParty/opus/{include,celt,silk,silk/float,src}`.
   - `ARCHS = arm64` (see root `CLAUDE.md` for why x86_64/universal is broken).

## Swift interop

Swift can't call libopus's variadic `opus_encoder_ctl` / `opus_decoder_ctl` directly. Typed wrappers live next door in `../opus-bridge/OpusBridge.{c,h}` and are the only way the Swift side drives CTL operations.

## Updating

1. Download the new release tarball from https://downloads.xiph.org/releases/opus/.
2. Replace `celt/`, `silk/`, `src/`, and `include/` with the corresponding directories from the tarball (float sources only; skip fixed-point).
3. Re-delete `src/opus_custom_demo.c`.
4. Diff `config.h` against the release's `config.h.in` and update any new feature flags.
5. Update the version and tag above.
6. Rebuild; smoke-test encode and decode against `mumble.sh1t.space:64738`.
